projects.title: Darul Uloom School Management System
projects.description: Full-stack school management platform for Darul Uloom Faizan-E-Ashraf with authentication, an admin dashboard, dynamic routing, and a 13-table PostgreSQL schema covering students, staff, and academics.

projects.title: Attendance Management System
projects.description: Web-based attendance tracking system built for institutional use, with role-based access and real-time record keeping backed by Supabase.

projects.title: CSA Exam Simulator
projects.description: Practice exam simulator for the EC-Council Certified SOC Analyst exam, with scenario-based questions covering the incident response lifecycle, SIEM, and MITRE ATT&CK.

projects.title: PHISHORA v2.0
projects.description: Full-stack phishing threat intelligence platform integrating VirusTotal, HaveIBeenPwned, and OpenPhish feeds, with a phishing email analyzer and breach checker.

projects.title: Good Ledger Financial
projects.description: Financial services website built to present accounting and ledger-management offerings with a clean, trustworthy business front end.

projects.title: Mugly Café Order System
projects.description: Order management system for cafés with waiter, kitchen, admin, and customer QR-menu panels, and real-time order tracking.

projects.title: Majlis Restaurant QR Menu
projects.description: Digital QR-based restaurant menu with an Islamic luxury aesthetic, real-time sync, and 130+ items across 16 categories.

projects.title: Scanpee POS App
projects.description: Point-of-sale app for retail businesses with inventory tracking, sales records, and PDF export, built on Flutter Clean Architecture.
